bead.title: Expose route traces with snapshot facts and score components
bead.description:
Make routing decisions auditable by exposing the exact snapshot facts and score components used for selection.

Route traces for route-status, Execute events, and session logs should include:
- snapshot version or captured_at timestamp
- per-candidate billing kind, actual_cash_spend, effective_cost, effective_cost_source
- health/quota/model-discovery freshness state used by scoring
- hard rejection reason when ineligible
- score components: cost, task/power fit, reliability/quota health, latency/performance, locality, utilization, stale/refresh risk, sticky affinity where applicable
- final selected candidate and policy/client input summary

Root cause: optimal routing is only testable and debuggable if operators can see why gpt-5.5 lost or won, whether a stale field was refreshed, and whether a user constraint forced a worse model.

In scope: public route candidate/event structs, CLI JSON/human output, session log projection, tests.

Out of scope: changing score weights or refresh orchestration.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test . ./agentcli ./internal/routing/... -run 'Test.*Route.*Trace|Test.*RouteStatus|Test.*ExecuteRouteEvidence|Test.*ScoreComponents' -count=1 passes.
2. fiz route-status --json against a fixture includes snapshot timestamp/version, effective_cost, actual_cash_spend, freshness fields, rejection reason, and score components for each candidate.
3. Execute session logs include the selected route plus enough candidate evidence to explain user-constraint failures and cheap/default/smart choices.
4. Human route-status output names stale/refresh_failed fields and actual spend separately from effective cost.
5. rg -n 'effective_cost|actual_cash_spend|snapshot.*captured|score_components|freshness' service_events.go agentcli service_session_log.go service_routing.go returns production coverage.

events.body: {"rationale":"","score":0,"suggested_fixes":null,"waivers_applied":null,"warning":"lint hook: dispatch-failure: ResolveRoute: policy \"air-gapped\" has no candidate satisfying local endpoint: 5 candidates rejected"}
